name: hoopedorc
description: Hoopedorc — a multi-model AI coding orchestrator (Claude + OpenCode models working as a team).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @orc/types && npm run build -w @orc/adapters && npm run build -w @orc/engine && npm run build -w @orc/server && npm run build -w @orc/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @orc/types && npm run build -w @orc/adapters && npm run build -w @orc/engine && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.mock: concurrently -n mock-api,web -c green,magenta "MOCK=1 npm run dev -w @orc/server" "npm run dev -w @orc/web"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w @orc/server
